name: Path Traversal: '\absolute\pathname\here'
description: The product does not properly neutralize Windows-style absolute path sequences ('\absolute\pathname\here') using backslash separators in user-supplied input, allowing attackers to specify arbitrary files on the filesystem.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path starting with '\' (backslash) that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node that rejects absolute paths, normalizes separators, or enforces the path must be relative to a restricted base directory
